Paper Title: Fusion analysis of gray matter and white matter in subjective cognitive decline and mild cognitive impairment by multimodal CCA-joint ICA
Dataset Name: sMRI and DTI brain imaging data (62 SCD, 99 MCI, 70 HC subjects)
Method Name: Multimodal Canonical Correlation Analysis + Joint Independent Component Analysis (mCCA-jICA)
Description: Fusion of structural MRI and DTI to identify covariant gray and white matter abnormalities in cognitive decline.

Paper Title: Fused-Deep-Features Based Grape Leaf Disease Diagnosis
Dataset Name: Open grape leaf disease image dataset
Method Name: CNN Deep Feature Extraction + Feature Fusion + Multi-class SVM
Description: Deep features extracted from ResNet models are fused and classified using SVM for fast and accurate grape disease detection.

Paper Title: Dwarfism computer-aided diagnosis algorithm based on multimodal pyradiomics
Dataset Name: Brain imaging data (pituitary gland MRI) + clinical features
Method Name: Multimodal Pyradiomics with Tensor/Binary Wavelet Segmentation + Feature Fusion Model
Description: Radiomics and clinical features are fused to distinguish growth hormone deficiency and idiopathic short stature.

Paper Title: Postoperative Opioid Prescribing After Female Pelvic Medicine and Reconstructive Surgery
Description: Review of opioid prescribing practices to generate evidence-based postoperative guidelines for FPMRS procedures.

Paper Title: Multi-UAV Information Fusion and Cooperative Trajectory Optimization in Target Search
Method Name: Minimum Spanning Tree Communication + Consensus Algorithm + Future-Dependent MPC
Description: Information fusion and cooperative trajectory optimization for multi-UAV dynamic target search using predictive control.
